name: alsay-mcn
description: Alsay MCN - Professional multi-channel network platform providing comprehensive digital marketing solutions for enterprises

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:static
scripts.build:css: mkdir -p build/css && find css -name '*.css' -exec cssnano {} build/{} \;
scripts.build:js: mkdir -p build/js && find js -name '*.js' | while read -r file; do mkdir -p build/$(dirname $file) && terser $file -o build/$file; done
scripts.build:static: cp index.html notes.html manifest.json sw.js robots.txt sitemap.xml CNAME LICENSE README.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md SEARCH_PANEL_README.md STABILITY_FIXES_README.md DEPLOYMENT_STATUS.md style.css script.js build/ && cp -r images data build/

author: Alsay
